title: application shell
text: application shell A software module used to initialize and run a desktop application (Windows or character-based) or application server. Synonyms: start-up shell When executed, the application shell invokes the ProcScript code in the apStart trigger and starts an application window use to display application forms. Each application shell can have a session panel and a pop-up panel that are available throughout the duration of the application session.
